calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Continued To Jul-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Dean Christopherson, Esq. for Defendant also specially apearing for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUL-08-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-06-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Hearing Regarding Pltff'S Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Linda Forster, #11288, (925)548-1420.

Caroline Patterson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A, a national association,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Hossein Zavvari, an individual,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 40 and all persons unknown claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest in the property described in the complaint adverse to it's title or any cloud upon Plaintiff's title thereto dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

It is adjudged and decreed:

1. The WAMU Deed of Trust, a copy of which is attached to the judgment as Exhibit "A", is hereby declared a valied lien against the Property (363 Byxbee Street, San Francisco, CA 94132) and has constituted a valid lien against the Property since April 4, 2008.

2. Plaintiff may record a copy of the WAMU Deed of Trust as if it were the original.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
